title: UnDercontrol Workspace Session
description: Initiates a workspace session via 'ud apply -f'. Uses YAML envelope format (apiVersion/kind/spec). Fields match the backend POST /workspace/init API. Optional fields are resolved via cascading fallback chains when omitted.

task_id.description: Task UUID or prefix to bind the workspace session to. Required.

daemon_id.description: Target daemon UUID. Optional — resolved: agent.default_daemon_id → first online daemon.

agent.description: Agent name or UUID. Resolved to agent_user_id for delegation. Optional.

agent_user_id.description: Agent user UUID for delegation. Takes precedence over 'agent' field. Optional.

prompt.description: Trigger prompt sent to the agent. Optional.

board_id.description: Board name or UUID for kanban context. Optional — resolved: agent.default_board_id → task's board.

project_id.description: Project UUID for workspace context. Optional — resolved: board.project_id → agent.default_project_id.

cwd.description: Working directory override. Optional — resolved: project.cwd → task.metadata.cwd → board.metadata.projectDir → ~.

command.description: Launch command override. Optional — defaults to 'claude --dangerously-skip-permissions'.
